recommendations.title: Last Looks
recommendations.overview: A disgraced ex-cop seeks solace by moving to the woods, but his quiet life comes to an end when a private eye recruits him to investigate the murder of an eccentric TV star's wife.

recommendations.title: Man on a Ledge
recommendations.overview: An ex-cop turned con threatens to jump to his death from a Manhattan hotel rooftop. The NYPD dispatch a female police psychologist to talk him down. However, unbeknownst to the police on the scene, the suicide attempt is a cover for the biggest diamo

recommendations.title: Inconceivable
recommendations.overview: A mother looks to escape her abusive past by moving to a new town where she befriends another mother, who grows suspicious of her.

recommendations.title: My First Summer
recommendations.overview: Isolated on a remote property, 16-year-old Claudia finds her world transformed when a spirited girl named Grace wanders into her garden.

recommendations.title: Love Hurts
recommendations.overview: A realtor is pulled back into the life he left behind after his former partner-in-crime resurfaces with an ominous message. With his crime-lord brother also on his trail, he must confront his past and the history he never fully buried.

recommendations.title: Texas Chainsaw Massacre
recommendations.overview: After nearly 50 years of hiding, Leatherface returns to terrorize a group of idealistic influencers who accidentally disrupt his carefully shielded world in a remote Texas town.

recommendations.title: Training Day
recommendations.overview: On his first day on the job as a narcotics officer, a rookie cop works with a rogue detective who isn't what he appears.

recommendations.title: Aftermath
recommendations.overview: When the others leave for the night, the last mortician begins to fondle the corpses. He quickly moves to the corpse of a young woman who died in a car crash.

recommendations.title: Raising Arizona
recommendations.overview: When a childless couple—an ex-con and an ex-cop—take one of a wealthy family’s quintuplets to raise as their own, their lives grow more complicated than anticipated.

recommendations.title: The Garden of Sinners: Overlooking View
recommendations.overview: The story starts following an incident: a young girl jumps from the top of a building. The image provokes a certain dread, as the girl appears to have been a corpse even before she jumped. The case is dismissed, yet more and more of these suicides oc
